_deployment_note: TEMPLATE WORKFLOW: Replace all hardcoded Supabase URLs with the target deployment Supabase URL before importing. Use N8N environment variables ($env.SUPABASE_URL) or update the DraggonnB Supabase credential. Credential ID: draggonnb-supabase. Runs at 03:00 SAST — 1 hour after engagement-score (02:00) to avoid contention.
name: DraggonnB - CRM Nightly Cleanup

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_OPS_CHAT_ID, text: '[CRM Cleanup] Deleted ' + $json.n_drafts + ' expired drafts + ' + $json.n_dismissals + ' expired dismissals\nRun: ' + $json.run_at, parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_OPS_CHAT_ID, text: '[CRM Nightly Cleanup Failed]
Run ID: ' + $execution.id + '
Error: ' + ($json.message || JSON.stringify($json)) + '
Timestamp: ' + new Date().toISOString(), parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}
